stories.headline: Another attempted arson attack on a London synagogue reported
stories.description: A synagogue was hit by an arson attack overnight, a Jewish community body said.

stories.headline: Half Man: Richard Gadd on his follow-up to Baby Reindeer
stories.description: Gadd's new six-part drama explores the breakdown of the "unshakable" bond between two young Glaswegian men.

stories.headline: Why was a plane too heavy for take-off at Southend Airport?
stories.description: The weather, length of runway and number of passengers can all impact a plane's ability to fly.

stories.headline: Iran, US still ‘far’ from breakthrough amid Strait of Hormuz impasse
stories.description: Tehran is ‘fully prepared’ for the US to resume hostilities at any moment, says Iran’s parliament speaker Ghalibaf.

stories.headline: Lionel Messi scores twice as Inter Miami defeat Rapids in MLS
stories.description: Argentine forward’s brace included the match winner against Colorado Rapids in front of over 75,000 fans in Denver.
